title: Full Moon Night Market
description: An evening market timed to the full moon, featuring crystal vendors, tarot readers, handmade ritual goods, and live music under the stars.

title: New Moon Intention Circle
description: A guided gathering to set intentions for the new lunar cycle, with meditation, journaling, and a shared tarot pull.

title: Community Reiki Share
description: An open Reiki share where practitioners and curious beginners exchange gentle energy work in a supportive circle.

title: Crystal Bowl Sound Bath
description: A restorative sound bath using crystal singing bowls to guide deep relaxation and nervous-system reset.

title: Tarot 101 Workshop
description: A beginner-friendly workshop covering the structure of the deck, reading three-card spreads, and building intuition.

title: Crystal Grids & Intention Workshop
description: Learn to build crystal grids aligned with sacred geometry to amplify and focus your intentions.

title: Tampa Bay Psychic & Holistic Fair
description: A gathering of readers, healers, and holistic vendors offering readings, energy work, and metaphysical goods.
